summary: Comprehensive testing of Laxmi Oils FMCG e-commerce platform - Full-stack FastAPI + React app. All 32 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend flows tested successfully including Home, Products, Product Detail, Cart, Checkout, Login, Register, Account, Admin, B2B, and Policy pages.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
JWT auth properly implemented with Bearer token scheme
MongoDB _id properly excluded from API responses
Shipping logic correctly implemented (free above ₹499, else ₹49 standard, ₹79 express)
Admin role-based access control working correctly
seed_data_creation: 6 products seeded on startup (m1l, g1l, s1l, m5l, g5l, s5l). Admin user seeded with credentials from .env
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs and frontend flows are working correctly. Backend tests cover: API root, Products CRUD, Auth (register/login/me), Orders (guest/customer/shipping calculations), B2B leads, Admin endpoints (stats/orders/leads/product management). Frontend tests cover: Home page with hero/bestsellers/categories/testimonials, Products page with filters/sort, Product detail with gallery/size selector/cart, Checkout 3-step flow, Login/Register forms, Account page with order history, Admin dashboard with all tabs, B2B form submission, Policy pages (Terms/Privacy/FAQ). Razorpay payment is MOCKED - orders are recorded with payment_method='razorpay_mock' and status='paid'.

mocked_apis.razorpay: Payment is mocked - no real payment processing. Orders are created with payment_method='razorpay_mock' and status='paid'

backend: POST /api/auth/register creates new customer with JWT
POST /api/auth/login with admin creds returns JWT with role=admin
GET /api/auth/me with Bearer token returns current user
POST /api/orders as guest creates order with computed shipping
POST /api/orders as customer creates order with user_id
GET /api/orders/me returns orders for authenticated user
POST /api/products as admin creates product; as customer returns 403
GET /api/admin/orders returns all orders for admin
frontend: Home page renders hero, bestsellers, trust stats, category cards, testimonials, blog preview
Products page fetches list, filters by category + size, sorts work
Product detail shows 4-image gallery thumbnails, pack size selector changes price, Add to Cart opens drawer
Cart drawer persists in localStorage, qty +/- and remove work
Checkout 3-step flow (address → delivery → payment) works, Place Order POSTs /api/orders and shows Shukriya success with order_id
Login form works with admin creds, redirects to /account
Register creates new user and auto-logs-in
Account shows order history for logged-in user
Admin dashboard tabs: Dashboard (stats), Products (new/edit/delete), Orders (status update), B2B Leads
B2B form submits to /api/b2b/leads and shows success
Terms, Privacy, FAQ render static policy content
Navbar shows Login when logged out, Account dropdown when logged in
Coupon banner LAXMI100 + WhatsApp floating button render
